title: get_blocking inside-runtime code path has no test
description: The get_blocking() function has two code paths: called outside a tokio runtime (Err arm of try_current) and called from inside a runtime (Ok arm, spawns a scoped thread). Only the outside-runtime path is tested (get_blocking_outside_runtime). The inside-runtime scoped-thread path is untested. Scenario: a refactor of the scoped-thread logic breaks the inside-runtime path; the test suite stays green; callers using get_blocking inside an async context get a panic or deadlock at runtime. The maintenance consequence is a regression that CI cannot catch.
